## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Include `velora.css` via...
2. Add class `vel-...` to...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens. Screenshots or a CodePen/JSFiddle link are helpful.

## Environment

- VeloraCSS version: <!-- e.g. v0.3.0 or commit hash -->
- Browser + version: <!-- e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 124, Safari 17 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 24.04 -->

## Additional context

Anything else — conflicting styles, specific HTML structure, reproduction link, etc.
